name: environment_near_miss_event_generates_northpine_tru_loy
premise: A Environment field incident unit is in a fast-moving incident involving environment near miss event generates northpine tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases ecological harm, community impact, and compliance. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Amina Mensah
agents.identity: I am Amina Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Environment when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Mateo Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Mateo Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environment.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Amina Mensah must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Amina Mensah do?
